---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
library(ggforce)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)

# 生成数据
states <- c('genus1', "genus2", "genus3", "genus4", 'genus5','genus6', "genus7", "genus8","genus9","genus10")
df <- data.frame(
  state = states,
  amount = c(4, 3, 1, 1.5, 6,6, 1, 2,1,5)
)
# pieplot 函数
pieplot <- function(data, state_col = "state", value_col = "amount", r0 = 0,
                    explode_groups = NULL, explode = 0.15, 
                    label_radius = 0.6, offset = 0) {
  
  # 数据预处理 - 确保数据格式正确
  df <- data.frame(
    state = data[[state_col]],
    amount = as.numeric(data[[value_col]])  # 确保数值类型
  )
  # 移除NA值
  df <- df[complete.cases(df), ]
  
  # 按数值排序
  df <- df[order(df$amount, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  # 设定为因子，关键
  df$state <- factor(df$state, levels = unique(df$state))
  # 计算百分比和累积角度
  total_amount <- sum(df$amount)
  df$ratio <- df$amount / total_amount * 100
  
  # 修复角度计算
  cumulative_sum <- cumsum(df$amount)
  df$start_angle <- c(0, cumulative_sum[-nrow(df)]) / total_amount * 2 * pi
  df$start_angle <- -df$start_angle
  df$end_angle <- -cumulative_sum / total_amount * 2 * pi
  df$mid_angle <- (df$start_angle + df$end_angle) / 2
  
  # 创建标签
  df$label <- paste0(df$state, "\n(", round(df$ratio, 1), " %)")
  
  # 初始化explode向量
  explode_vec <- rep(0, nrow(df))
  
  # 如果指定了要突出的分组
  if (!is.null(explode_groups)) {
    explode_vec[df$state %in% explode_groups] <- explode
  }
  
  # 计算标签位置（考虑explode偏移）
  df$label_x <- (label_radius + explode_vec) * cos(df$mid_angle + pi/2)
  df$label_y <- (label_radius + explode_vec) * sin(df$mid_angle + pi/2) + offset
  
  # 绘图
  p <- ggplot(df) +
    ggforce::geom_arc_bar(
      aes(
        x0 = 0, y0 = 0, r0 = r0, r = 1,
        amount = amount,
        fill = state,
        explode = explode_vec
      ),
      stat = "pie",
      color = "white", 
      linewidth = 0
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(x = label_x, y = label_y, label = label), 
              color = "white", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  # 如果安装了ggsci包，使用它，否则使用默认配色
  if (requireNamespace("ggsci", quietly = TRUE)) {
    p <- p + ggsci::scale_fill_npg()
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# 使用示例1：突出显示genus1
# png("pieplot1.png",width = 6,height = 6,unit = "in",res = 600,family = "serif")
# dev.off()
pieplot(df, explode_groups = "genus9",explode = 0.15)

# 使用示例2：突出显示多个分组
pieplot(df, explode_groups = c("genus2","genus7", "genus8"), explode = 0.1)

# 使用示例3：不突出任何分组，调整标签位置
pieplot(df, explode_groups = NULL, label_radius = 0.7, offset = 0.05)

# 使用示例4：突出genus5，调整标签径向位置
pieplot(df, explode_groups = "genus5", explode = 0.15, 
               label_radius = 0.65, offset = 0)
# 使用示例5：设置r0，圆环图 
pieplot(df, explode_groups = "genus9",r0 = 0.6, label_radius = 0.8, explode = 0.15)

# 其他数据
data("mtcars")
mtcars$group <- row.names(mtcars)
pieplot(mtcars[c(1:5),], state_col = "group", value_col = "mpg", explode_groups = "Datsun 710", explode = 0.15, 
        label_radius = 0.65, offset = 0)
# 补充下用该数据生成玫瑰图
# 顺便画个玫瑰图
ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(state, -amount),   #数据降维排序，更好看 
               y = amount, fill = state)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.9, 
           color = "white") +  # 白色边框提升分割感
  coord_polar(start = 0) +  # 极坐标系转换，起始角度为0
  # scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +  # 使用ColorBrewer配色
  ggsci::scale_fill_npg()+ # 使用ggsci的配色
  ylim(limits = c(-1,max(df$amount) + 1)) +  # 设置limit为负值可显示中间圆
  # theme_minimal() + # 带网格线，此时可以不显示图例
  # geom_text(aes(x = state, y = amount + 0.3,label=amount), color="black", size=5) + # 显示标签
  theme_void() +  # 空白主题
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),   #隐藏y轴标签
        axis.title = element_blank(),  # 隐藏坐标轴名称 
        legend.position = c(0.6,0.2)) +   #隐藏/显示图例/none/right，精确坐标0-1范围 
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2))  # 设置图例行数为2
# png("玫瑰图.png",width = 6,height = 6,unit = "in",res = 600,family = "serif")
# dev.off()

```

# Save plot
ggsave("pieplot1.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
